title: cardamine amara subsp. amara
intro: Cardamine amara subsp. amara, also known as bitter wintercress, is a perennial plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that thrives in wetlands and damp areas. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Consuming bitter wintercress can provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant's leaves and stems can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and other minor health complaints.
